name: Barbecued Venison Ribs
recipeIngredient: 6 lbs Venison ribs with some loin and meat attached
Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except ribs and pepper. Blend well.
3. Sprinkle the ribs with pepper and additional salt.
4. Place the ribs in a double layer in a 5-quart roasting pan.
5. Roast for 1 hour.
6. Pour sauce over the ribs. Increase heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake until the ribs just begin to char on top, about 1 1/2 hours.
7. Turn the ribs over and cover the pan. Bake for an additional 30 minutes longer, until the ribs are tender and the sauce is thick.
8. To serve, place the ribs on a serving platter and pour sauce over the ribs.
9. Makes about 6 servings.
Note: If the venison has a slightly gamey taste, increase the vinegar in the sauce to 3 tablespoons. Taste the sauce after mixing and add additional brown sugar to taste, about 1/2 cup.
